description_long: This is an adult woman wearing a modest outfit suitable for urban environments. She is dressed in a long-sleeved top, tailored pants, and high-heeled shoes, with a hijab neatly wrapped around her head and neck. Her posture is upright and she appears to be in mid-stride, suggesting she is walking. The clothing fits closely but comfortably, and her hands are relaxed at her sides. The overall appearance is neat and presentable, with no visible accessories or carried items. The figure is proportionate and realistic, with natural body contours and a composed facial expression.
description: An adult woman in a modest outfit with a hijab, long-sleeved top, tailored pants, and high heels, walking upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hijab framing the face, long-sleeved top, tailored pants, and both arms visible at her sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hijab, the fit of the top and pants, and the high-heeled shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hijab, the fit of the top and pants, and the overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, hijab, and the relaxed arm posture.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved top, tailored pants, high-heeled shoes, hijab
